message: Node started: Conduct a deep dive into theoretical physics literature (quantum optics and black hole thermodynamics) to identify exactly three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. Look for parameters related to photon statistics (e.g., g^(2)(0)), Wigner function negativity, or the quantum-to-classical transition threshold. For each constant, provide: 1) The formal name, 2) The mathematical symbol, and 3) The exact numerical value.
